articles.title: Alzheimer's Reversal Protocols Buried by Big Pharma's Trillion-Dollar Failure Machine
articles.summary: Mercola exposes how pharmaceutical giants have systematically suppressed metabolic and nutritional approaches to Alzheimer's reversal while burning through billions on failed drug trials. articles.title: Ozempic's Suicide Signal: 45% Spike in Death Ideation Buried in WHO Data
articles.summary: World Health Organization surveillance data reveals semaglutide (Ozempic/Wegovy) increases suicidal ideation by 45%, yet regulatory agencies and Novo Nordisk continue pushing the blockbuster drug. Another psychiatric casualty of profit-over-safety medicine.

articles.title: Exercise Longevity Research Thrives Outside Pharma's Stranglehold

articles.title: Abundant Iron Outperforms Rare Metal Catalysts — Pharma Manufacturing Cartel Panics
